// Description: Fixture workspace settings — applied to both F5 launches (Tier 5) and @vscode/test-cli automated runs (Tier 4). Pins the live kernel path and the diagnostic file location so artifacts always land in a known place. See Testing.md §5.
// Kernel transport: Default (live) kernel comes from package.json contributes default (useStub=false). The explicit workspace override was REMOVED here because workspace-scope settings WIN over ConfigurationTarget.Global, which broke stub-tier tests that set useStub=true via getConfiguration().update(...). Stub tests can now successfully set useStub=true at the global scope; live tests use the package.json default of false.
// Python interpreter: Pixi-managed kernel env. Absolute path required because Extension Host's child_process.spawn does not inherit shell PATH activation.
// Auth path: API-key auth via .env at repo root. The kernel's __main__.py walks up via find_dotenv(usecwd=True) — verify the .env exists at <repo>/.env before F5.
// Notebook trust: Trust the fixture workspace by default so F5 doesn't prompt.
// Files to exclude from explorer: Hide diagnostic + work_dir artifacts that fill up between runs.
